basic_details.job_title: Bijapur District – Rural Horticulture Extension Officer – 8 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bijapur District Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Rural Horticulture Extension Officer. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Bijapur District official website bijapur.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
